description: Shufti is an identity verification and compliance platform that provides KYC, KYB, AML screening, fraud prevention, and transaction monitoring services. It serves businesses that need to verify users or companies and monitor risk across onboarding and ongoing compliance workflows.
summary: Shufti exposes a REST verification API at https://api.shuftipro.com/ authenticated with back-office API keys, plus an OAuth 2.0-protected MCP server at https://shuftipro.com/mcp.
